business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

coverages_discussed.coverage_type: Workers Compensation and Employers Liability Insurance
coverages_discussed.current_limit: Employers Liability: $1,000,000 each accident; $1,000,000 disease policy; $1,000,000 disease each employee
coverages_discussed.notes: Policy number WC-KCB-2025-5580. Coverage part form number WC 00 00 04. Endorsements include Waiver of Our Right to Recover From Others, Alternate Employer Endorsement, All States Endorsement, and Terrorism Risk Insurance Act Endorsement.

document_info.document_type: Workers Compensation and Employers Liability Insurance Policy

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: SIC Code: 1521. Description: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania.

concerns: Construction operations include higher-hazard trades and classifications such as carpentry, electrical wiring, plumbing, masonry, and painting.
Large estimated annual remuneration shown across classifications, including $5,915,000 for carpentry, $6,635,850 for masonry, and $5,010,000 for clerical office employees.
positives: Waiver of Our Right to Recover From Others Endorsement is included.
